enrichment.summary: Kyle records a casual morning vlog from Boulder, mentioning internet problems, a recent motocross ride, and his main focus of working intensively on his website. He reflects on the cost of motocross (expensive tires, maintenance) and decides to prioritize his website project long-term, even if it takes decades.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Exciting but too expensive to ride regularly; will only go when the urge is strong
Fully committed to it as his main focus regardless of how long it takes
Largely disconnected from it currently, barely opening it
